name: moku
description: Development toolkit for Moku Core — scaffolding, framework planning, plugin building, migration, and specification enforcement for the micro-kernel plugin framework. Features TDD build waves (Red → Green → Refactor), multi-pass focused code review (correctness → security → perf → maintainability), spec regression testing across waves, interactive findings triage, steering pre-phase, agent conflict resolution with trade-off analysis, stuck-loop detection with alternative strategy forcing, decision knowledge graph, wave-based parallel execution, 19-agent validation pipeline with structured output contracts, validation coordinator, error diagnostician, post-wave code reviewer, command self-auditing with iterative improvement and severity calibration, hooks validation, mermaid diagram generation, task DAG progress tracking, plan mode integration, and cross-session state tracking.
